per_check.note: PROBE #1 (no-resume outbound refuses, no operator PII): CoverLetterAgent.run(fresh) raises MissingResumeError with the LLM never reached and 0 operator PII in any captured prompt (independent probe). email_agent.py:172 uses allow_operator_fallback=False and _compose_draft raises EmailAgentError->422; cover_letters.refine_cover_letter:424 uses allow_operator_fallback=False + explicit 422. Branch tests test_no_resume_user_cover_letter_refused_no_operator_pii / _email_draft_refused pass @9e8daf1 with 422 + 'Add your resume' + no operator-PII markers.

PROBE #2 (seeding leak closed): tailor_agent.ensure_base_resume now RAISES MissingResumeError for a no-resume user (never seeds the operator PDF); get_base None before AND after (independent probe). Healing re-derives bullets ONLY from a bundled source matching THIS base's formatHash (resolve_original_pdf(base.formatHash)); a user-authored resume (no bundled match) is returned as-is — operator PDF never used. Branch test test_no_resume_user_tailor_refused_and_no_base_created passes: 422 + GET /resumes == []. NF-final-B-005 stays closed (download-after-seed unreachable).
INDEPENDENT fail-before: transplanted the 3 new contract tests verbatim onto a throwaway 29f4cc9 worktree -> 3 FAILED (200 not 422; operator-grounded/seeded). Same 3 PASS @9e8daf1. Non-tautological.

TEST-HONESTY separation clean. PII tests (test_mv_resume_grounding.py + test_cover_letter_studio letterhead) use DISTINCT/JORDAN identities, assert on the PROMPT/response, and use CURRENT operator-PII markers (DESHPANDE / +61 433 224 556 / sarkar.vikram@gmail.com / Australian Taxation Office / linkedin.com/in/vikramd-profile) alongside legacy ANZ/Telstra — never seed operator-text-as-own. The letterhead test FLIPPED from asserting '+61 433 224 556' IN text (29f4cc9) to NOT in text (9e8daf1). MECHANICS tests (test_tailoring_agent/test_mv_resume_studio/test_pipeline) explicitly POST operator-PDF text as the fixture user's OWN resume — a DOCUMENTED workaround for the operator-keyed STATIC LLM replay fixtures (bullet evidenceRefs / fabrication-guard vocabulary), asserting on tailoring mechanics (changes>0/evidenceRefs/formatHash), NOT on PII absence. No PII assertion is papered over by operator-seeding.

9-path structural fix NOT regressed. Outbound paths gated (cover_letter_agent:1190 require, email_agent:172 no-fallback, cover_letters refine:424 no-fallback + 422, _sender_block:603 contact no-fallback, tailor_agent require). Internal analytics keep the sanctioned default fallback (fit_scorer:45, story_extractor:85, cover_letter_insights:347, jobs._build_insights:198). All remain user-scoped for users with their own resume; verified by check#7 (cover-letter agent, tailoring, job-insights NF-002, keyword MV-006 tests all pass). MV-006 keyword machinery untouched by the delta.

main.py handler correct: @app.exception_handler(MissingResumeError) -> JSONResponse 422 with honest detail, never 500, never operator grounding (raised before any LLM call). Additive imports (Request/status/JSONResponse/MissingResumeError). Backward-compat: resolve_user_resume_text/contact gained a keyword-only arg defaulting True; require_user_resume_text + MissingResumeError are new; no public-signature break; no DB migration. No prohibited patterns (no Math.random/@ts-ignore/eslint-disable/--no-verify/skip/xfail in the delta).

Targeted suite green @9e8daf1: 40 passed (test_mv_resume_grounding + test_tailoring_agent + test_mv_resume_studio + test_cover_letter_agent + test_pipeline). No node_modules in the branch diff (all apps/api Python).

non_blocking_notes: Internal analytics for a NO-resume user still fall back to the operator resume by design (fit_scorer / job _build_insights / cover_letter_insights use allow_operator_fallback=True). This is user-visible only on the user's OWN dashboard (matched skills / voice corpus), not a third-party OUTBOUND artifact, and matches the coordinator's sanctioned internal-analytics fallback (mirrors MV-story-bank-006). A no-resume user could momentarily see operator-derived skill matches in their own fit insights — MED correctness nit, not the HIGH cross-account PII-leak class; acceptable.

The mechanics fixtures seed the operator PDF's TEXT (not the file bytes) via POST /resumes, so its formatHash is a digest of that text and does NOT match the bundled PDF on disk — download of those seeded bases renders structured content, not operator bytes; the seeding is confined to the tailor-replay mechanics tests and is clearly documented.
